feedback.text: Hello, I would like to propose that protections for game purchases be included in the Digital Fairness Act. There is an initiative already in the EU called "Stop Killing Games" that is adjacent to what we need included here. Games are being deleted from our digital libraries with no notice and no compensation after a lawful purchase. No company should be able to retroactively deny a product we have bought and own with no repercussions or consequences. Please take in consideration this matter also while discussing the Digital Fairness Act. Thank you
